2604.21836.title: Modulating Cross-Modal Convergence with Single-Stimulus, Intra-Modal Dispersion
2604.21836.paper_summary: Neural networks exhibit a remarkable degree of representational convergence across diverse architectures, training objectives, and even data modalities. This convergence is predictive of alignment with brain representation. A recent hypothesis suggests this arises from learning the underlying structure in the environment in similar ways. However, it is unclear how individual stimuli elicit convergent representations across networks. An image can be perceived in multiple ways and expressed differently using words. Here, we introduce a methodology based on the Generalized Procrustes Algorithm to measure intra-modal representational convergence at the single-stimulus level. We applied this to vision models with distinct training objectives, selecting stimuli based on their degree of alignment (intra-modal dispersion). Crucially, we found that this intra-modal dispersion strongly modulates alignment between vision and language models (cross-modal convergence). Specifically, stimuli with low intra-modal dispersion (high agreement among vision models) elicited significantly higher cross-modal alignment than those with high dispersion, by up to a factor of two (e.g., in pairings of DINOv2 with language models). This effect was robust to stimulus selection criteria and generalized across different pairings of vision and language models. Measuring convergence at the single-stimulus level provides a path toward understanding the sources of convergence and divergence across modalities, and between neural networks and human neural representations.
2604.21836.paper_summary_zh: 神經網絡在不同架構、訓練目標甚至數據模態之間展現出顯著的表徵收斂程度。這種收斂預測了與大腦表徵的對齊。最近的假設表明，這源於以相似的方式學習環境中的潛在結構。然而，尚不清楚個別刺激如何在網絡中引發收斂的表徵。一幅圖像可以以多種方式被感知，並用不同的詞語表達。在此，我們引入了一種基於廣義Procrustes算法的方法來測量單一刺激層面的模態內表徵收斂。我們將其應用於具有不同訓練目標的視覺模型，根據其對齊程度（模態內分散）選擇刺激。關鍵是，我們發現這種模態內分散強烈調節了視覺和語言模型之間的對齊（跨模態收斂）。具體而言，模態內分散低（視覺模型之間高度一致）的刺激引發的跨模態對齊顯著高於模態內分散高的刺激，最高可達兩倍（例如，DINOv2與語言模型的配對）。這一效應對刺激選擇標準具有穩健性，並在不同的視覺和語言模型配對中具有普遍性。在單一刺激層面測量收斂為理解模態之間以及神經網絡與人類神經表徵之間的收斂和發散來源提供了一條途徑。
2604.21836.author: Eghbal A. Hosseini et.al.
2604.21836.authors: Eghbal A. Hosseini, Brian Cheung, Evelina Fedorenko, Alex H. Williams
